notes: SHIP v1.14.208 — PHASE CHECKLIST: expandable per-phase item lists inside deploy_showRackDetail. Each of the 5 phase cards (MECHANICAL/POWER/NETWORK/COMPUTE/VALIDATION) gains a CHECKLIST strip: tappable header with a live count meter (done/total + %) in the phase color, a 3px progress bar, and an accordion body of item rows (44px min, green ring-check, full-line tap toggles). Items = locked defaults per phase (mech 8 air / 10 dlc, power 6, network 6, compute 6, validation 5) + SITE-LEVEL add/edit/remove persisted to phantom_checklist_site_v1 (first brick of the AUS-01 site profile). Every item carries an optional free-text NOTE (torque/serial/XID/photo-ref) — wantNote rows show the field open, others reveal it via '+ note'; debounced ~400ms. cooling:'dlc' rows (manifold seat, leak check) show only on liquid-cooled platforms (GB200/GB300/NVL72), fail-open when hardwareType absent/generic. Per-rack check+note state RIDES existing phase objects (ph.checks / ph.notes) — NO new per-rack key, NO migration, persisted via deploy_savePhases. Rack % (phasesDone/5) UNCHANGED; item % renders inside the phase card only — zero rollup/floor-map/skyline/audit consumers touched. COMPLETE sign-off unchanged except a SOFT confirm ('N items unchecked — complete anyway?') added to ge_onCompleteTap; last-item-checked does NOT auto-complete. Locked deployments render read-only (notes shown, no toggle/add/edit). DEVIATIONS FROM SPEC (reported): (1) the count meter + chevron live in a dedicated CHECKLIST strip below the action buttons rather than 'right of the status badge' — keeps ALL checklist markup in ONE gated injection point, avoids editing the shared phase-header row, and gives a larger gloved tap target; feature is identical. (2) Accordion + edit state held in transient module vars (_checklist_open/_checklist_edit) so in-flow re-renders (add/edit/remove) preserve expand state — still lost on reload = 'not persisted' per spec. Redesign-only: ALL render + the complete-guard are gated behind redesign_isOn(); ?legacy=1 rack detail + complete flow are byte-identical (no .pcl markup emitted, no guard). CSS: one body.rd-scoped .pcl-* block before main </style>; note input uses the padding-box ring primitive (no border-box, per the iOS raw-input lesson). Gates: node --check x3 (concatenated inline JS), CSS brace balance, CRLF preserved, three-stamp lockstep .207->.208. Grep-verified: no innerHTML sink takes a note value or item label unescaped (escHtml on every label + note render + value attr; rename reads label via lookup, never through an attribute). ROLLBACK: git revert. SHIP-ORDER NOTE: spec gated on .204 device-verify; this is the 7th ship in the open BATCH-VERIFY batch (.202-.208) — one past the 6-cap. DEVICE-VERIFY CHECKLIST: (1) Open a rack in Work>Deploy>rack detail; each phase card shows a CHECKLIST strip; in_progress phase auto-expanded, others collapsed. (2) Tap items -> green ring-check, meter + bar update live WITHOUT collapsing the accordion. (3) wantNote rows (torque/serial/XID/leak) show the note field open; type a value, leave + reopen rack -> value persists. (4) '+ note' on a plain row reveals an input. (5) + ADD ITEM (prompt) -> new row appears on THIS rack AND every other rack (site-scoped). (6) EDIT -> per-row red x (default->removed, user item->deleted) + tap label to rename; DONE exits. (7) A DLC rack (GB200/GB300/NVL72) shows the 2 extra mechanical DLC rows; an H100/H200 rack does NOT; a rack with no recognizable GPU shows them (fail-open). (8) On an in_progress phase with unchecked items, tap COMPLETE -> 'N items unchecked — complete anyway?' soft confirm; last check does not auto-complete. (9) Complete the deployment -> checklist read-only, notes shown, no add/edit. (10) ?legacy=1: rack detail has NO checklist strip and COMPLETE shows no checklist confirm (byte-identical).
